Package io.vanslog.spring.data.meilisearch.repository.support

Class SimpleMeilisearchRepository<T,ID>

java.lang.Object
io.vanslog.spring.data.meilisearch.repository.support.SimpleMeilisearchRepository<T,ID>
Type Parameters:
T -
ID -
All Implemented Interfaces:
MeilisearchRepository<T,ID>, CrudRepository<T,ID>, PagingAndSortingRepository<T,ID>, Repository<T,ID>
public class SimpleMeilisearchRepository<T,ID> extends Object implements MeilisearchRepository<T,ID>
Meilisearch specific repository implementation.
Author:
Junghoon Ban
